preservedSource.note: All W6-owned remediation files were materialized from the preserved read-only source, then corrected in this clean worktree.

requirementsAuditDisposition.note: Pairing, durable device/session authority, forward rotation, response loss, two-tab convergence, replay-family revoke, logout and forget-device remain server-authoritative.
Expiry, logout, forget-device, replay-family revocation and every reset stage remain mutation-closed across restart.
Direct HTTP, untrusted forwarding, ambiguous forwarding, wildcard CORS, sibling authority, cross Origin and missing Origin reject before cookie/body/idempotency work.
The model keeps authority in symbolic server rows and never emits a credential; real SQLite/keyring crash recovery remains a target gate.
The proposed inventory now matches W4 native paths and protocol/source hashes and requires build/image identity, ABI, UID/GID/mode, strip/no-source, init, seccomp and load evidence.
Every required image surface must be enumerated and terminal-free; the current standalone artifact still fails and is not represented as available.
@fastify/cookie remains absent; no network-derived compatibility or fake availability claim was introduced.
W6 estimates hosted composition/packaging only; W4 owns native implementation/probes and the controller must deduplicate shared image-readiness work.

findingResolutions.result: Restart admission requires a ready keyring, unrevoked device and active unrevoked session; focused restart schedules pass.

W6 consumes exact W4 ready/drained records with current trusted control-channel provenance; stale, malformed, residual and unclassified evidence fails closed. W4 must still emit the production protocol.
Native paths/hashes/recipe match W4 and omission negatives cover every required metadata class; null/pending final facts keep releasePasses=false.
Owned Node ABI 137, Electron ABI 143 lookup and two SQLite write/read/reopen probes pass; final-image/Electron loads remain unverified.
All 11 handoff-listed untracked additions are covered by no-index whitespace checks in this worktree.

checks.result: 1183 modules transformed; seven CJS artifacts emitted
schema, ownership, finding set, native omission negatives, handoff completeness, ABI smoke, scan freshness and secret/path checks pass

all untracked additions checked; zero whitespace findings

unverifiedClaims: W4 production process-anchor emission and final stable-target behavior remain outside W6.

blockers.finding: W6 now consumes the W4 protocol exactly, but the reviewed W4 C spike does not yet emit the accepted versioned drain record.
blockers.controllerAction: Have W4 emit and verify the shared ready/drained protocol before paired adoption.

blockers.finding: The current standalone artifact lacks the required worker/native manifest and contains forbidden fake/terminal surfaces; all final native build/image metadata remains null or pending.
blockers.controllerAction: Build the exact allowlisted image, populate the manifest from measured facts, rerun W4 probes and repeat focused reciprocal review.
